anomalies.note: Close != settle_price — normal for options with mark-to-market

Rows with missing expiry_date — likely from preprocessing parse failures. These rows have valid strikes and OHLC but no expiry, making them unusable for IV computation and chain construction without recovery.

feature_plan.reconstruction: Newton-Raphson on Black-Scholes using: close, strike_price, underlying_price/spot, expiry_days, risk-free rate
feature_plan.notes: Already implemented. Cap at 500%. Use settle_price as fallback if close=0.

feature_plan.reconstruction: Black-Scholes closed-form from IV, spot, strike, T, r
feature_plan.notes: Compute after IV reconstruction. Standard BS formulas.

feature_plan.reconstruction: Available in 2025-2026 parquets. For 2012-2024: join with spot_daily parquet or use futures close as proxy.
required_inputs: futures close from same bhav copy
feature_plan.notes: Futures close is a good proxy (basis typically <0.5%). Spot file covers 2007-2026.

feature_plan.reconstruction: Available in 2024-2026 parquets. For 2012-2023: use close as proxy (bhav copy close is EOD last traded or theoretical).
feature_plan.notes: In NSE bhav copy, close is the official closing price. last_price adds LTP info.
Calendar days, not trading days. Already implemented.

feature_plan.reconstruction: strike_price / spot for CE, spot / strike_price for PE
contracts column = number of contracts traded. Multiply by lot size for notional.
feature_plan.notes: Lot size changed over time (50→75→25 for NIFTY). Track lot size schedule.
